message:
Stage 0.5 (typed) D0.R escalated on round 1 (before cap) — the directed revise cannot fix the findings in place: thm:postdesign-wald (wrong_measure): the defect is statement-level, not proof-DAG/prose-level. The current node asserts the Wald coverage liminf under a free measure P_p, while the proof and all referenced objects are instantiated at the selected design p_n^*(G_n) and therefore support only the law P_{p_n^*(G_n)}. Any honest fix requires changing the theorem's displayed statement/conclusion to bind the measure to the selected design; that kind of statement edit is outside Stage 0.R's in-place scope and must be made by the orchestrator in the proto, otherwise the edit will be discarded on re-solve.
Open findings: wrong_measure@thm:postdesign-wald. Provide guidance via the D0 directive (a new direction / a paper to adapt / a reframing) and re-run, or rewind D0/D-1.2.
